# scaleway_iam_saml_certificate (Data Source)

Get information about a SAML certificate. This data source allows you to retrieve information about a specific SAML certificate by its ID.



## Example Usage

```terraform
### Get information about a SAML certificate

data "scaleway_iam_saml_certificate" "main" {
  certificate_id = "22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222"
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `certificate_id` (String) The ID of the SAML certificate

### Read-Only

- `content` (String) The content of the SAML certificate
- `expires_at` (String) The expiration date and time of the SAML certificate
- `origin` (String) The origin of the SAML certificate. Possible values are: `scaleway`, `identity_provider`.
- `type` (String) The type of the SAML certificate. Possible values are: `signing`, `encryption`.
